bead.title: C3: move review verdict handling into try.Attempt (180 lines from loop body)
bead.description: execute_bead_loop.go:637-816 (the 180-line review block) moves into try.Attempt. Loop now only sees Disposition (Merged / Retry / Park / NeedsHuman). applyReviewTriageDecision callout moves inside try.Attempt as private method.
bead.acceptance: 1. execute_bead_loop.go:637-816 review block removed; equivalent logic in try.Attempt. 2. Loop body shrinks correspondingly (verify line count drop). 3. C0 fixture diff: review-related lifecycles (success+APPROVE, success+BLOCK, success+REQUEST_CHANGES) byte-identical event streams. 4. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green. 5. Server worker integration test (cli/internal/server/...) green.
